title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 15
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear a customer talking to a shop assistant.
questions.audio_script: Assistant: Can I help you with those bags? || Customer: Yes, I like the red backpack, but it has too many pockets. My old bag broke last week, so I need new ones today. || Assistant: We also have a suitcase with wheels. || Customer: I don't need something that big. I just need something for carrying books to college. || Assistant: In that case, try these. || Customer: Thanks. [1]I'll take the plain blue shoulder bag[/1], if you have them. || Assistant: I do. You can sit here while I get them from the store room.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: Can I help you with those bags?

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Yes, I like the red backpack, but it has too many pockets. My old bag broke last week, so I need new ones today.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: We also have a suitcase with wheels.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: I don't need something that big. I just need something for carrying books to college.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: In that case, try these.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Thanks. I'll take the plain blue shoulder bag, if you have them.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: I do. You can sit here while I get them from the store room.

questions.question: What does the customer decide to buy?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, large suitcase with wheels, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, plain blue shoulder bag, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, red backpack with many pockets, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The customer says they will take the plain blue shoulder bag.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about what to take.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the mountain walk? || Man: Almost. I put in a cap and trainers because the forecast was dry yesterday. || Woman: It changed this morning. The guide said it may be windy while we cross the open hill. || Man: Really? Then I should change something. || Woman: I would. [1]Put your wool hat in the bag[/1]. || Man: Good idea. I don't want to carry a folded raincoat all day, and the hat will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the mountain walk?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Almost. I put in a cap and trainers because the forecast was dry yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. The guide said it may be windy while we cross the open hill.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Really? Then I should change something.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I would. Put your wool hat in the bag.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. I don't want to carry a folded raincoat all day, and the hat will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me.

questions.context: You hear two people in a café.
questions.audio_script: Girl: What are you ordering for dinner? || Boy: I wanted the fish, but my brother had it yesterday and said it was too salty. || Girl: The vegetable soup looks good. || Boy: It does, but I had soup for lunch. I think [1]I'll choose the rice with chicken[/1]. || Girl: Nice choice. I'm having that too. || Boy: Great. Could you save us a table near the window while I pay? The café is getting busy, and I don't want to sit outside. It's still cold today. || Boy: That should make things easier. || Boy: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost tennis racket.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Did you find your tennis racket? || Boy: Not yet. I checked the changing room, because I was sure I had it there after the match. || Girl: And what about the car park? You went there afterwards. || Boy: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the club secretary phoned and said [1]my racket was behind the desk at the tennis club[/1]. I'm going to collect it before the place closes. || Girl: Good. You looked worried this morning. || Boy: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you find your tennis racket?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Not yet. I checked the changing room, because I was sure I had it there after the match.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: And what about the car park? You went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the club secretary phoned and said my racket was behind the desk at the tennis club. I'm going to collect it before the place closes.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good. You looked worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going to the art club after class? || Boy: I don't think so. The teacher is ill, so the club is cancelled. || Girl: We could go to the library instead. || Boy: Maybe, but it closes early on Fridays. My cousin invited us to the new skate park, so [1]we're going skating there instead[/1]. || Girl: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the school gate? || Boy: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker. || Boy: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Are we still going to the art club after class?

dialogue.speaker: boy

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: We could go to the library instead.

dialogue.speaker: boy

dialogue.text: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker.

dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

questions.audio_script: Speaker: Hi, it's Hannah. I'm calling about tomorrow's dance class. I told you it was at six, but that was my mistake. The hall is being used by another group then, and the room is not free after eight. So [1]the class now begins at half past six[/1]. You don't need to bring your dance shoes because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Hi, it's Hannah. I'm calling about tomorrow's dance class. I told you it was at six, but that was my mistake. The hall is being used by another group then, and the room is not free after eight. So the class now begins at half past six. You don't need to bring your dance shoes because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

questions.question: What time should the listener arrive for the dance class?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at half past six and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at six o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at eight o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the class now begins at half past six.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the sports centre.
questions.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the sports centre on Tuesday? || Boy: I was going to walk, but it takes nearly an hour. || Girl: I can ask someone to drive us. || Boy: That's kind, but the car is being repaired. I checked the timetable, and [1]the tram goes almost to the sports centre entrance[/1]. || Girl: Great. Does it leave near your house? || Boy: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.
